originalTitle: 1000 Players Simulate PRISON in Hardcore Minecraft
content: On the Unstable SMP, over 1000 players have been captured and trapped inside the largest prison on the server. This is the full story of how I escaped Purgatory... 1000 Players Simulate PRISON in Hardcore Minecraft Unstable SMP Members ➜ @wemmbumc ➜ @FlameFragsMC ➜ @ParrotX2 ➜ @Spokeishere possible spoilers below this point Features: @jamatopecan @MapiccMc @jumperwho @devMCchamp2 ItsAli @found2fast(twitch) @n3tm3tr1x (https://www.youtube.com/@n3tm3tr1x) & all of the trusted members! music: Hollow Knight: Silksong soundtrack by Christopher Larkin (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q6is6K8jbho&pp=ygUTc2lsa3Nvbmcgc291bmR0cmFjaw%3D%3D) Ivory / @ivoryfrill & @MythrodakTV DM DOKURO / @DMDOKURO Chris Christodoulou / @AstronautDown Pascal Stiefel / @Plasma3Music Lena Raine / @LenaRaine C418 / @C418 Peter McConnell This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. spoke
chineseTitle: | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 | | 名 | 玩 | 家 | 在 | | H | a | r | d | c | o | r | e | | M | i | n | e | c | r | a | f | t | | 中 | 模 | 拟 | 监 | 狱 |
chineseContent: 在 Unstable SMP 中，超过 1000 名玩家被捕获并被困在服务器上最大的监狱中。这是我如何逃离炼狱的完整故事... 1000 名玩家在《铁杆 Minecraft》中模拟监狱不稳定 SMP 成员 ➜ @wemmbumc ➜ @FlameFragsMC ➜ @ParrotX2 ➜ @Spokeishere 以下可能剧透 特点：@jamatopecan @MapiccMc @jumperwho @devMCchamp2 ItAli @found2fast(twitch) @n3tm3tr1x (https://www.youtube.com/@n3tm3tr1x) 以及所有值得信赖的成员！音乐：《空洞骑士：Silksong》配乐，作者：Christopher Larkin (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q6is6K8jbho&pp=ygUTc2lsa3Nvbmcgc291bmR0cmFjaw%3D%3D) Ivory / @ivoryfrill & @MythrodakTV DM DOKURO / @DMDOKURO Chris Christodoulou / @AstronautDown Pascal Stiefel / @Plasma3Music Lena Raine / @LenaRaine C418 / @C418 Peter McConnell 这是关于不稳定宇宙的视频：一个分阶段的 Minecraft 服务器，Spoke、Wemmbu、FlameFrags 和 ParrotX2 旨在讲述尽可能最好的故事。顺便说一句，Unstable SMP 视频中讨论的许多游戏机制/故障/红石对于 Unstable SMP/Unstable Universe 来说都是独特的，并且两者都不会以相同的方式工作/在香草 Minecraft 中不存在。辐
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
